title: AHUNTTER 3 Pack Mesh Waste Paper Bin 12 Litres Metal Waste Basket Small Trash Can Rubbish Bin for Bedrooms Bathrooms Office Home Kitchens Supplies, 24 X 26cm Silver Circular
features: High Quality: This kind of waste paper basket is made of high-quality iron wire, strong and durable, not easy to deform. The surface is treated with baking varnish and is not easy to rust.

Bottom Bump Design: There are three powerful protruding feet on the bottom of this metal mesh waste paper box, which can make the waste paper basket stand stably, not easy to fall, and prevent long-term wear and tear.
Mesh Design: The mesh structure of the trash basket is more breathable and helps prevent moisture accumulation. Breathable design prevents accumulation of odor.

Wide Use: Our office wastebasket has an opening diameter of 23.5cm and a height of 26cm. It is very suitable for use in offices, lounge, kitchens, bathrooms, bedrooms, dormitories, classrooms, and keep the surrounding environment clean and tidy.

Detail Treatment: The top of this home storage bin has a seamless iron wire surface seam, which is not easy to scratch the garbage bag and hands; The bottom edge is 2cm metal edging to prevent liquid leakage.
description: AHUNTTER Pack of 3 Circular Mesh Wastebasket Trash Can Dustbin Sturdy Basket Metal Mesh Waste Bin for Office, Living Rooms Bathrooms, Kitchens, Classrooms -Silver Feature: 1. Metal mesh surface material, sturdy and durable; paint process, beautiful and breathable, not easy to rust. 2. Lightweight material, small size, can save space. 3. Very suitable for use in offices, kitchens, bathrooms, bedrooms, dormitories, classrooms. 4. Hollow simple style, adding fashion and beauty to the family. Specification: Material: Metallic iron Color: Silver Size: 23.5 x 26cm Package Included: 3 x Waste Paper Bins
